.env was tracked since init and contained JWT secrets and DB credentials.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add metrics/logs endpoints, openapi docs, cursor pagination, and application_name denormalization

Admin endpoints:
- GET /admin/metrics: total requests, active apps, failed attempts (24h window), uptime
- GET /admin/logs: paginated auth event log with cursor-based pagination

OpenAPI / Swagger:
- Add utoipa, utoipa-axum, utoipa-swagger-ui dependencies
- Annotate all 10 endpoints with #[utoipa::path] and ToSchema derives
- Serve Swagger UI at /docs via OpenApiRouter

Cursor pagination (src/pagination.rs):
- Generic CursorPage<T> and CursorParams reusable across future endpoints
- Composite (occurred_at, id) cursor encoded as opaque base64url string
- Fetch limit+1 rows to detect next page without COUNT; next_cursor: null on last page
- Add InvalidCursor error variant (400)

Application name denormalization:
- Add name column to applications (apps now have their own identity)
- Add application_name column to auth_events (captured at write time)
- Remove 2-table JOIN from logs_handler; name survives renames and deletions
- Update write_auth_event to accept application_name
- Add rate limiting rules for /admin/metrics and /admin/logs

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add schema migrations for auth_events, multi-tenancy, and admin invites

- admin_project_memberships: maps admin users to projects with owner|admin roles

commit.message:
v5.10.0 (#102)

* ## v5.10.0
- *Enhancement:* `TestSharedState` updated to enable request-based (isolated) state; with the corresponding `GetHttpRequestId()` method now made public.
- *Enhancement:* Added `ApiTesterBase.AddPreRunAction()`, `AddPostRunBeforeExpectationsAction()`, `AddPostRunAfterExpectationsAction()` and `AddPostRunAction()` to enable the addition of actions to be executed at different stages of the `Run`/`RunAsync` process for every underlying test. This will enable the addition of common pre/post processing logic without having to explicitly add to each test.
- *Enhancement:* `TEntryPoint` methods can now be specified as `static`.
- *Enhancement:* `ApiError` added implicit conversion from (`string?`, `string`) tuple to enable simplified usage; e.g. `AssertErrors(("field", "Bad Request"))` versus `AssertErrors(new ApiError("field", "Bad Request"))`.
- *Fixed:* Reset `MockHttpClientRequest` internal state when using any `With*` method to ensure correct behavior.

commit.message:
v0.1.12: revert to v0.1.10 base + apply ha-mcp-bridge s6 pattern

Root cause of v0.1.11 failure:
addon/run.sh was mode 100644 in git. The Dockerfile RUN chmod sets the
bit at build time, but the Supervisor clones fresh on rebuild — git
restores the original 100644 mode, so s6-overlay cannot exec the script:
  s6-overlay-suexec: fatal: can only run as pid 1

Fix (mirrors ha-mcp-bridge v0.1.2 which works):
- Reverted Dockerfile/run.sh to v0.1.10 as clean base
- Applied services.d pattern (no ENTRYPOINT override)
- Changed run.sh shebang to with-contenv bashio
- git update-index --chmod=+x addon/run.sh (mode 100644 -> 100755)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
